name: Email Marketing Playbook
description: Email Marketing Playbook - Marketing template for channels professionals
instructions: How to Use This Template Step 1: Define Your Email Strategy Start with the Strategy tab. Set your goals, define your audience segments, and decide what types of emails you will send. Strategy before tactics — always. Step 2: Map Your Sequences Go to the Sequence Builder tab. Design your automated email flows: welcome series, nurture sequences, re-engagement, post-purchase. Map the trigger, timing, and goal for each email. Step 3: Plan Your Campaigns Use the Campaign Planner tab for one-off and recurring sends: newsletters, promotions, announcements, seasonal campaigns. Plan the calendar, segme
